_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: Compared to NF1-WT controls (NF1-EV and Nf1-WT), NF1-deficient cells proliferate faster in 2D
details: NF1-deficient MCF7 cells (NF1-45) proliferate faster in 2D culture compared to NF1-WT controls
